summary: Standard pool/B-roll footage of Trump departing for China: he walks across the tarmac at Joint Base Andrews past staff and Secret Service, climbs the Air Force One stairs, and waves from the top. It is a straightforward single sequence with no title cards, graphics, color grading, or stylized cutting. A routine travel/news departure clip rather than an entertainment or genre-styled produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS departs for China, where he'll make the first state visit by a U.S. President since his last visit in 2017'
On-aircraft: 'United States of America' / presidential seal on stairs
